publications.title: Effective access to chat-based health interventions in LMICs: Multi-country evidence and design strategies
publications.annotation: The first cross-country synthesis of chatbot access and design patterns across multiple LMIC programmes, establishing what works when a digital intervention has to function outside a trial site.
